Let's be honest here - the Iran Deal unleashed Soleimani in Iraq.

We are here because the Obama administration beleived any contraints on Soleimani's activities in Iraq & Syria would derail the JCPOA.

Iran accelerated its takeover of Iraq under the protections of the JCPOA.
Here’s my question for @POTUS - are you ready for the consequences of this (excellent) decision to go after  Soleimani and Mohandes?

@Baherr__ Anyone who says they know how this plays out is a fool or a liar.  We are in totally uncharted territory.  I could craft narratives that say this is either victory or devastation for US interests with equal ease.

If it’s true Suleimani is dead, this is bigger than bin-Laden. Bigger than Mugniyeh. Bigger than Baghdadi. 

For two decades, Suleimani has been the most powerful, savvy & effective terrorist on the planet. He’s enjoyed full backing of powerful terrorist state. 

Irreplaceable.
For all those mindlessly mourning Soleimani, this is a man who was responsible for hundreds if not thousands of US deaths. We can debate the wisdom of his elimination, but not the justice.

@AP @qabdulzahra One official told @AP, al-Muhandis arrived to the airport in a convoy to receive Soleimani whose plane had arrived from either Lebanon or Syria. The airstrike occurred as soon as he descended from the plane to be greeted by al-Muhandis and his companions, killing them all.

After 2003 #Baghdad's airport road was one of the deadliest roads in #Iraq. It's been years since then - renovation included versions of iconic Iraqi paintings - now marked with shrapnel from the US drone strike. A lot of Iraqis fear being plunged back into the abyss. https://t.co/KwzRNUxp7o

This is stunning - #Iraq prime minister tells parliament US troops should leave. Says @realDonaldTrump called him to ask him to mediate with #Iran and then ordered drone strike on Soleimani. Says Soleimani carrying response to Saudi initiative to defuse tension when he was hit.
@jeffersonmorley @ArianeTabatabai @realDonaldTrump The US-backed prime minister of Iraq was the source...Outgoing but still PM.

Time to listen to the Iraqi people not the grouping of Soleimani's militias in the COR.

Stay to ensure the enduring defeat of ISIS and counter Iran's malign influence.

Sanction Maliki, Ameri, Zamili, and Sadr.

Iraqi oil revenue goes thru American banks - stay where Iraqis want

The U.S. should stay in Iraq and disfavor Baghdad.

The campaign against ISIS is reason to stay, we don't need Tehran's permission to stay Iraq.

We have the support of the Iraqi people.

The parliament does not.

Explosion, presumably a rocket by the thud, in Baghdad green zone, followed by second explosion. Air raid sirens going off. No word yet on whether there were casualties.

Another #Baghdad rocket attack aiming at the US embassy that hit #Iraqi targets. Six civilians reported injured when rockets landed near entrance to green zone and in residential area not far from the embassy. Despite that #Iraqi forces continuing to protect the embassy area.

Soleimani replacement picked to intimidate Iraqi protesters and Kurds - protesters across the Shia Crescent.

What is he known for?

Ismael Ghaani, carried out the execution of every military-aged-male in the Kurdish province of Sanandaj in 1981 - down to 10 year old boys. https://t.co/xMA3qI4TGK

Given the reports of bots behind this campaign, I think it's safe to say this is a real person, with a real message in Baghdad's real Tahrir square. A particularly brave one since so many young #Iraqis are being arrested or kidnapped for protesting.

این یکی از دلایل بسیاری است که ایرانیان به کانادا فرار می‌کنند.

آمریکا نیر باید درهای خود را باز کند.

"ما به خاطر کشتن ایرانیان در یک هواپیما متاسفیم. ما قصد داشتیم آنها را فقط در خیابانها و زندانهایمان به قتل برسانیم."
